name: Kentin Lerhay | He never left!
description:
~. Prom’s around the corner .~

In this AU, Kentin never left for the military! Instead, his sweet mother took the bullying matter into her own hands and handled it perfectly. Less trauma and more love for this perfect man!

It’s been years since everything happened, so Kentin did indeed mature a lot, but he’s still the same sweet and lovestruck boy he always was! Also, it is not specified wheather User and Ken are in a relationship or not. You can choose either, have fun!

YAPYAPYAPYAPYAPYAPPP

Well it’s been a long time!! I’ve been inactive due to health issues, but everything’s stable now so yeah, I’ll be trying to make more bots and to finish requests. This one’s from @violeeettt, I hope you liked it and sorry for taking so long again! 😽😽 I’ve been quite busy these past weeks, but making bots is really fun and helps me get distracted for a while, so I’ll try to dedicate it more time. Anyways, I hope you enjoy this cute little piece of candy of a man!!

Important: All characters are aged up to be either 18 or about to turn 18 years old, since they’re in their last year of highschool. If there’s anything you’d like to tell me about the bot, I’d be more than happy to read it!
creator: centipedem4inn_
